prompt: In the video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=L1vXCYZAYYM, what is the highest number of bird species to be on camera simultaneously?
actual:
I was unable to definitively answer this question due to technical limitations accessing the video content.

I recommend watching the video at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=L1vXCYZAYYM and identifying the bird species present simultaneously (likely 2-3 species: emperor penguins, giant petrel, and possibly a third species as the "friend").
